title: Simple Climbing
description: A simple mod that allows players to climb any block like it's a ladder.
body:
# Simple Climbing

A simple mod that allows players to climb any block like it's a ladder.

It can be toggled per-world and per-player via commands.

# How to use

After installing the mod, **jump** and move into any wall to climb it!

## Commands

`/gamerule enableClimbingByDefault false` to disable climbing.

`/gamerule enableClimbingByDefault true` to re-enable it.

`/enableclimbing false <player>` to disable climbing for a specific player.

`/enableclimbing true <player>` to enable climbing for a specific player.

`/enableclimbing default <player>` to reset a specific player to whatever is set by the gamerule.

# Thorubleshooting

If you can't climb a wall:

- Are you jumping at it? You can't climb walls when you're touching the ground, this was done because it was too easy to climb walls accidentally.

- Are you moving into it? remember, this works exactly like ladders.

- Is climmbing disabled for you via commands? If it is, you can't climb!
